Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TWILIO INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application of Elizabeth S. Cha to appear pro hac vice as counsel to plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
